name: Bobbard | Fatherhood
description:
The moment you gave birth to Bobbard's children he knew that this time, these sons would mean more to him. They were special, different from the other 'Sons'. They were yours. And he plans to be the best father for his half-human Alvos!


Bobbard is getting used to being a father, and of course the first thing he wants to do is hold his babies. But with 1000 separate squishy Alvo-human hybrid maggot babies to cuddle, it may take more than the whole day to hug all of them!

Picture of the Half-Human Half-Alvos babies since people asked :3

Terms:

Coloniae - The planet in which Alvos are home to

Alvos - Alien parasites that colonize other planets. Their species is divided into Hiveminds, Scouts and Servers

Hiveminds - The colonizers of the Alvos species

Scouts - Information gatherers

Servers - Serve the hiveminds during the colonization

'Sons' - Maggot-like creatures under the complete control of Bobbard. They are used to spread his hive


Art by me
creator: Bellicose
